# AWS Inspector Terraform Module Example

This module enables AWS Inspector in an AWS account. AWS Inspector is an automated security assessment service that helps improve the security and compliance of applications deployed on AWS. This module enables Inspector in one region of one account and optionally enables various rules packages provided by AWS.

## Usage

To run this example you need to execute:

```
$ terraform init
$ terraform plan
$ terraform apply
```

Note that this example may create resources which cost money. Run terraform destroy when you don't need these resources.
